title: Nether Expansion
description: This mod adds several new biomes, mobs, blocks, and even water to the nether
body:
## What the Mod is about

Nether Expansion is a mod that seeks to expand upon the nether and adds new mobs, biomes, blocks, ores, and places to find water in the nether(yes I'm serious).

There are currently 9 new biomes:

Toxic Wastes

Electric Forest

Wet Forest(where the water is)

Nether Desert

Volcanic Wasteland

Lushios Forest

Nether Plains

Frosty Lands

Nether Dripstone caves

**And 8 new mobs**

Piglin Assassin

Wisp

Radioactive Dweller

Nether Zombie

Nether Creeper

Acidic Walker

Lava Walker

Magma Walker

**There are also several new dimensions that are variants of the nether**

Acidic nether, an expansion on the toxic delta biome, with two more biomes, the acidic plains and deltas

Overnether, a corrupted version of the overworld, it has all the vanilla nether biomes but without the nether roof

Modded Overnether, the same thing as the overnether but with modded biomes

Dark Nether, the nether if it was dark just like in alpha

Modded Dark nether, modded nether but dark

Floating Nether, the nether but with floating islands, but due to the way biomes in dimensions with end like terrain work, not all biomes spawn, even though it's entirely vanilla biomes, this bug can't be fixed

Floating Modded Nether, same thing but modded biomes, not all biomes will spawn

Modded Nether, the oldest variant of the nether, it was added in 1.0.0 as a home for all the modded nether biomes without any vanilla biomes to override

Tropical Nether, it's lush here, looks nothing like the nether

Amplified Nether, meant to be double the original height, but because I failed to do this, it's just a vanilla nether for now

Currently there is only one new structure, the Nether Tower structure, but I plan to add more in the future

There are also 4 new ores, Aventurine, Infernal, Acidic, and Sapphire. This mod is no longer in beta but still expect more things to be added until I can't update it anymore due to the same thing that happened with my end update mod and winter mod

this mod was made with mcreator even though it doesn't really look like a typical mcreator mod, hopefully that excuses why there's extra dimensions

I made a video on the mod, watch it here
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mP3J922MGak" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### I am aware of a bug that makes the nether wastes biome have grass blocks on the surface instead of netherrack within modded dimensions, this has nothing to do with this mod itself, it affects other mods as well, this bug is only fixable by creating a custom nether wastes biome
